name: Myth of Mirka
short_description: Immerse yourself in a mind-bending choose-your-own-adventure visual novel, powered by AI. Follow a daring streamer's quest, uncovering the chilling secrets of yetis, witches, and covert military operations. Each decision unveils a new layer of mystery, blurring the lines between reality and fiction.
detailed_description:
In the midst of World War III, a streamer crash-lands in Mirka—a town entangled in a secret war. They discover a covert military operation targeting both yetis and witches. A lone yeti named Henri, alongside an enigmatic witch, becomes their unexpected ally. Together, they expose the military's plans, forge a bond, and defy the odds, fighting to find the truth.

CONTROLS:
LEFT MOUSE CLICK anywhere on a page to move forward or backward a page.
M = Mute
Q = Quit
THE TABLE OF CONTENTS button in the top left corner will return you to Page 01.
